name: Chocolate Almond Torte with Strawberry Sauce
recipeInstructions:
Line the bottom of a 9-inch springform pan with wax paper; grease the paper.
Using a blender, mix sugar and margarine until fluffy. Add egg yolks.
In a food processor, process almonds and chocolate until finely ground. Stir into the sugar mixture.
In a separate bowl, beat egg whites to stiff peaks. Mix 1/3 of the whites into the batter. Gently fold in the remaining whites.
Spread the batter into the pan, smoothing the top. Bake for about 1 1/2 hours until the top springs back. Cool for 10 minutes before releasing.
Sauce: Thaw and puree 2 cups frozen, unsweetened strawberries. In a small saucepan, combine 1 cup sugar and the puree. Simmer for 3 minutes. Cover and cool.
To serve, place the sauce on a plate. Place the torte on top. Garnish with fresh strawberries. Serves 16.
